## Human Checks (not enforced by CI)
- [ ] Mechanism or policy? Policy stays in plugins/traits, never Core.
- [ ] New state machines have `proptest` coverage.
- [ ] Cross-book changes link an ADR.
- [ ] Documentation matches code behavior.
